core_payload.content:
# CapsuleOS Project

## 1. Role
CapsuleOS Project will become the deeper control-plane program for sovereign knowledge, expanding the platform beyond the current implementation stream toward stronger branch intelligence, safer promotion mechanics, richer validator orchestration, and clearer runtime contracts.

## 2. Future Project Contract
The project will focus on making platform law legible at scale, deepening control-plane visibility across runtime, review, promotion, and archive decisions, and creating calmer contracts between quarry, refinery, workspace, swarm, and repository execution lanes.

## 3. Operational Consequence
Second-brain behavior will feel more stable because the substrate beneath it will become more deliberate, more governable, and less reliant on scattered folklore.

## 4. Philosophical Alignment
CapsuleOS Project supports To Dig Deep by making sovereign memory operate through stronger platform law rather than accidental coordination.

neuro_concentrate.summary: CapsuleOS Project defines the future control-plane program for sovereign knowledge: stronger branch intelligence, richer validator orchestration, safer promotion mechanics, clearer cross-domain contracts, and a calmer substrate for every downstream N1Hub system.

epistemic_ledger.rationale: Stripped meta-commentary leakage. Dream now asserts future state directly.
